name: Ningbo Deye Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Ningbo Deye Technology Group Co., Ltd. specializes in the research, development, production, and sales of inverters and related products for renewable energy applications, particularly focusing on solar inverters for residential, commercial, and utility-scale projects, and is located in Ningbo, China. The company also produces heat pumps, and offers complete solutions for smart energy management. Their products aim to promote energy efficiency and sustainability in the global market.
